name: Event-Driven Webhook Delivery (Activation)
description: When events are produced for a data product, resolve webhook consumptions (subscriptions) and enqueue delivery to the async webhook delivery pipeline. Composable activation template for Phase 6: event → consumption resolution → webhook-delivery-requested.
use_cases: Real-time webhook delivery to subscribers when data product events land
Event-driven activation: resolve consumptions and enqueue delivery
Composable template for webhook delivery pipeline (requested → processor → completed/failed)

entity.name: {{NAME}}
entity.description: Webhook delivery subscription for this data product

data_product.description: Data product whose events trigger webhook delivery

async_pipeline.description: Platform webhook delivery pipeline: requested → processor → completed/failed

placeholders.{{DATA_PRODUCT_ID}}: UUID of the data product to subscribe to
placeholders.{{NAME}}: User-provided name for the webhook subscription
placeholders.{{HEADERS}}: Optional JSON object of custom headers
